name: A2A Broker Adapter
description: Config-only opt-in surface for standalone A2A broker routing.

baseUrl.label: Broker Base URL
baseUrl.help: Base URL for the standalone a2a-broker service.

edgeSecret.label: Edge Secret
edgeSecret.help: Optional x-a2a-edge-secret header value for protected broker routes.

requester.id.label: Requester ID
requester.id.help: Default x-a2a-requester-id header when OpenClaw calls the broker directly.

requester.kind.label: Requester Kind
requester.kind.help: Default x-a2a-requester-kind header when OpenClaw calls the broker directly.

requester.role.label: Requester Role
requester.role.help: Default x-a2a-requester-role header when OpenClaw calls the broker directly.
